## Summary

Describe the change clearly.

## Change Type

- [ ] Report visual/layout change
- [ ] Semantic model change
- [ ] Compatibility or rewire change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Git/GitHub workflow change

## Files / Areas Affected

List the key folders, pages, visuals, tables, or measures touched.

## Validation

- [ ] PBIP opens cleanly
- [ ] Target page or model area was checked
- [ ] No known broken visuals introduced
- [ ] Project Memory updated if current truth changed

## Notes

Capture risks, provisional logic, or follow-up work.
